message:
feat(core): add sparse_table.rs — O(1) range min/max queries with O(n log n) preprocessing (ft-283h4.43)

Static sparse table with SparseTable (value queries) and IndexSparseTable
(index-returning queries). Supports both min and max operations with
constant-time overlapping-interval decomposition. 19 inline + 12 property-based tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
